keywords.job: I am a monk, collecting healing herbs.
keywords.name: My name is Loui.
keywords.monk: I am a humble servant of the gods.
keywords.tibia: Everything around us, that is Tibia.
keywords.rookgaard: This is the place where everything starts.
keywords.god: They created Tibia and all lifeforms. Talk to other monks and priests to learn more about them.
keywords.life: The gods blessed Tibia with abundant forms of life.
keywords.herb: I was looking for some herbs as I foolishly entered this unholy hole.
keywords.obi: He owns a shop in the town.
keywords.al: He owns a shop in the town.
keywords.dee: He owns a shop in the town.
keywords.seymour: Seymour is the headmaster of the local academy.
keywords.academy: Most adventurers take their first steps there.
keywords.willie: The gods may protect me from his foul language.
keywords.monster: There must be an army of them, just down this hole.
keywords.rabbit: So it must have been some magic wielding beasts using creature illusion. Good thing you escaped.
keywords.quest: I have no quests but to stay away from that hole and I'd recomend you to do the same.
keywords.task: I have no quests but to stay away from that hole and I'd recomend you to do the same.
keywords.gold: I am pennyless and poor as it is fit for a humble monk like me.
keywords.money: I am pennyless and poor as it is fit for a humble monk like me.
keywords.rat: The good thing is, those horrible rats stay in the town mostly. The bad thing is, they do so because outside the bigger Monsters devour them.
keywords.hole: While looking for herbs I found that hole. I went down though I had no torch. And then I heard THEM! There must be dozens!
keywords.story: While looking for herbs I found that hole. I went down though I had no torch. And then I heard THEM! There must be dozens!
keywords.them: They were so many, EVERYWHERE! I could barely escape alive. I have no clue what THEY were but one more second down there and I'd be dead!
keywords.heal: Sorry I am out of mana and ingredients, please visit Cipfried in the town.

texts: I am a monk, collecting healing herbs.
